creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
(In reply to Martin Waschbüsch from comment #5)

Could you check again what's written in hier(7)? I just checked on a 11.4-RELEASE and a 12.1-STABLE, and they actually both say the same thing:

Within local/, the general layout sketched out by
hier for /usr should be used.  Exceptions are the
ports documentation (in share/doc/<port>/), and
/usr/local/etc (mimics /etc).
